## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets` passes with no warnings
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] Public API changes are documented
